preamble: The transformation of a voiced alveolar affricate [dz] to a voiceless retroflex affricate [ʈʂ]. This complex shift combines retraction with devoicing, often found in languages with systematic sibilant hardening.

examples.note: The digraph 'tr' represents a historical retraction and devoicing of sibilant clusters.

sources: Thompson, L. C. (1965). A Vietnamese Reference Grammar.
Alves, M. J. (2006). Linguistic Research on the Origins of Vietnamese.
